     Title: A Safe Harbor for AI Evaluation and Red Teaming 
     Authors: Shayne Longpre ,  Sayash Kapoor ,  Kevin Klyman ,  Ashwin Ramaswami ,  Rishi Bommasani ,  Borhane Blili-Hamelin ,  Yangsibo Huang ,  Aviya Skowron ,  Zheng-Xin Yong ,  Suhas Kotha ,  Yi Zeng ,  Weiyan Shi ,  Xianjun Yang ,  Reid Southen ,  Alexander Robey ,  Patrick Chao ,  Diyi Yang ,  Ruoxi Jia ,  Daniel Kang ,  Sandy Pentland ,  Arvind Narayanan ,  Percy Liang ,  Peter Henderson              View a PDF of the paper titled A Safe Harbor for AI Evaluation and Red Teaming, by Shayne Longpre and 22 other authors

             Abstract: Independent evaluation and red teaming are critical for identifying the risks posed
